content:
I LIVE MY LIFE FOR YOU
Firehouse
chord by : Allan Christian "boy kainams" Calag
(i dedicate i dedicate i dedicate dis song to ee4 of AdDU

[Verse 1]
(plucking)
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch] 
You know you're everything to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]    
And I could never see, the two of us apart[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]          
And you know I give myself to you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]         
And no matter what you do, I promise you my heart[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Dadd9/F#[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I've built my world around you and I want you to know[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dadd9/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]      
I need you, like I've never needed anyone before[/tab]
